description:
One turn of the decide->act loop, emitted as schema-validated structured
output by the decision-tier worker (no native tool-use, no regex).

action == "call_tool":  execute `tool_name` with `tool_args` via MCP.
action == "finalize":   stop the loop and synthesize the FINAL_RESPONSE.

thought.description: ONE short sentence (max 20 words) — why this step
thought.title: Thought

tool_name.description: MCP tool to call when action == call_tool
tool_name.title: Tool Name

title: NextAction
